user_story: As a Manager, I want to view a summary of total appreciations per employee, so that I can gauge recognition at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciation Summary screen; When records exist; Then each employee is listed with their total appreciation count

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter the appreciation summary by period, so that I can review recognition over a chosen date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciation Summary screen; When I set a From and To period; Then the totals reflect only that period

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter the summary by department and employee name, so that I can focus on a specific team or person
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Appreciation Summary screen; When I select a department and an employee name; Then the summary shows only matching totals
